RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/oracle/crsp_bootstrap.oracle
RuleSet.GenRule: insert into $lower DbSchemaName$.SecUser ( createdat, createdby, updatedat, updatedby, secuserid, login_id, email_addr, pwd_hash, revision ) values ( curtime, '654dbba0-eda7-11e1-aff1-0800200c9a66', curtime, '654dbba0-eda7-11e1-aff1-0800200c9a66', '654dbba0-eda7-11e1-aff1-0800200c9a66', 'system', 'root', 'bootstrap', 1 );

select $lower DbSchemaName$.nxt_tenantidgen() into tenantid from dual;
insert into $lower DbSchemaName$.tenant ( createdat, createdby, updatedat, updatedby, clusterid, id, tenantname, revision ) select curtime, '654dbba0-eda7-11e1-aff1-0800200c9a66', curtime, '654dbba0-eda7-11e1-aff1-0800200c9a66', clusid, tenantid, 'system', 1 from dual;

insert into $lower DbSchemaName$.SecSess( secsessionid, secuserid, start_ts, finish_ts, revision ) values ( 'cb56d150-ea1a-11e2-91e2-0800200c9a66', '654dbba0-eda7-11e1-aff1-0800200c9a66', curtime, curtime, 1 );

insert into $lower DbSchemaName$.SecUser_h select secuserid, revision, clusid, 'cb56d150-ea1a-11e2-91e2-0800200c9a66', login_id, email_addr, null, null, null, pwd_hash, null, 0, curtime from $lower DbSchemaName$.SecUser where login_id = 'system';

insert into $lower DbSchemaName$.clus_h select id, revision, clusid, 'cb56d150-ea1a-11e2-91e2-0800200c9a66', fulldomainname, description, 0, curtime from $lower DbSchemaName$.clus where fulldomainname = 'system';

insert into $lower DbSchemaName$.tenant_h select id, revision, clusid, 'cb56d150-ea1a-11e2-91e2-0800200c9a66', clusterid, tenantname, 0, curtime from $lower DbSchemaName$.tenant where clusterid = clusid and tenantname = 'system';
